summary: Comprehensive testing of Aljabr Branch Management System completed. All core features working correctly for both Manager and Supervisor roles.

minor.issue: Supervisor credentials 'aalkhalf/super123' provided in test request do not work. User exists but password is different.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows clipboard permission error in test environment (expected browser restriction)

issues: Good contrast, proper spacing, footer present. No issues found.

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with two cards (Edit Branch, New Branch)
Logo displays correctly
Edit Branch form loads with all fields (branch_name, city, maps_link, phone, notes)
Edit Branch form submission works successfully
New Branch form loads with all fields and photo upload section
New Branch form validates minimum 5 photos requirement
Admin login works with manager1/manager123
Manager dashboard loads with all stats (Total, New, In Progress, Completed)
Manager can see all requests in dashboard (15 total)
Manager has access to Team Management tab
Manager can add new team member via Add Member dialog
Request detail page shows Copy Link button
Request detail page shows status dropdown that works
Request detail page shows assignment dropdown (Manager-only)
Search by branch name input present and functional
Filter by city dropdown present
Filter by status dropdown present
Notifications bell icon works - shows dropdown with notifications
Profile page loads with all fields (username readonly, name, email, phone)
Profile page can update user info successfully
Logout works correctly - redirects to login page
Supervisor login works (test_supervisor/TestSuper123!)
Supervisor cannot see Team Management tab (correctly hidden)
Supervisor sees 'My Assigned Requests' header
Supervisor badge displays correctly
Supervisor only sees assigned requests (role-based filtering works)
Backend APIs return correct status codes
CRUD operations work correctly
action_items: Update supervisor credentials in documentation - aalkhalf/super123 does not work. Either update password for aalkhalf user or use test_supervisor/TestSuper123!
critical_code_review_comments: React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in AdminLogin.js - minor React anti-pattern (setState in render). Not causing failures but should be fixed for clean code.

success_rate.backend: 95% (22/23 passed, 5 skipped due to incorrect supervisor credentials)

seed_data_creation: Created test_supervisor user with supervisor role, google_maps category
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working. Supervisor credentials in test request are wrong - use test_supervisor/TestSuper123! or fix aalkhalf password. The test_aljabr_api.py test file contains comprehensive pytest tests for all API endpoints.
